items.title: What a pleasant surprise:)
items.summary: Found this game by chance but what a good surprise. Really enjoying the game, graphics, sound, game play and despite being gacha got enough free polls to build teams ans get free SSR. Friendly community in discord as well helpful to build initial team and explain it.
items.author: hsantos18
